Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Investment between NakhonNexus Public Company Limited (a Thai SET-listed issuer) and JadePalm Digital Asset Services Co., Ltd. (Thailand), date [●].
Transaction: Non-binding proposal for private placement of unsecured convertible debentures by NakhonNexus to JadePalm, plus an option to acquire a minority stake in JadePalm; structure subject to the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) and approvals of the Office of the SEC Thailand and SET.
Status: This draft is for internal review; NakhonNexus’s Board has resolved to authorize exclusive negotiations pending definitive documents and SET disclosure; such resolution has not been publicly announced at the time of this draft.
Consideration/Pricing: All numerical terms are placeholders for modeling and educational walkthroughs; no market-sensitive amounts are included; any ISIN or ticker references (e.g., “TH-FAKE-000000”, “XX00”) are illustrative only.
Conditions Precedent: Thai SEC filing and SET notification, foreign investment approvals if applicable, satisfactory due diligence, and execution of a Share Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement.
Information Barriers: Parties will follow general information-barrier training materials and insider-list templates used for compliance workshops; no wall-cross of public-side personnel is contemplated for this stage.
Blackout and Tipping: References herein to blackout periods and anti-tipping rules are excerpts from NakhonNexus’s standard employee trading policy used in e-learning; these do not relate to any live trading halt.
ESG/Climate: ESG scorecard and climate-transition roadmap appear in marketing brochures for the “Green Ledger” initiative; they are non-binding and do not imply any sustainability-linked pricing.
Crypto/Tokenization: Any mention of crypto wallets or tokenized carbon credits refers to a sandbox tabletop exercise for product education; no custody of client digital assets or revenue projections are included.
Cyber: “Cyber incident playbook” and breach drill references are part of operational tabletop training; no undisclosed live incident data is shared in this term sheet.
Commercial Terms: Model “commercial-term signals” and negotiation checklists attached are generic procurement tools and do not reflect the parties’ final price, volume, or exclusivity provisions.
Employees and PDPA: Any employee examples are anonymized; personal data will be redacted in accordance with PDPA and internal privacy guidelines; role-based access only.
Regulatory Compliance: Any future disclosure will be made via SET/Thai SEC channels (e.g., current report and Form 56-1 One Report updates) after binding agreements; no solicitation to the public is made.
Timeline: Target signing window is an internal planning placeholder for training purposes; actual timetable is subject to mutual agreement and applicable Notification of the Capital Market Supervisory Board.
Governing Law: Thai law for share issuance; cross-border ancillary service agreements may adopt the laws of another jurisdiction as operationally appropriate.
Contacts: All communications to be via institutional channels and project role mailboxes; no personal emails or direct phone numbers are requested in this draft.
